case_title: JONAS ROGELIO PASTORA GUZMAN ET AL VS. T. OKAMOTO & CO. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KONO-MANNING, JULIE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO. KONO-MANNING, JULIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF JONAS ROGELIO PASTORA GUZMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KIMBLEY DISY DALIA SAFON TAYUM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JULIE KONO, AGENT. DEFENDANT JULIE KONO-MANNING IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED OCT-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASTORA GUZMAN, JONAS ROGELIO SAFON TAYUM, KIMBLEY DAISY DALIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO. KONO-MANNING, JULIE $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,210.00, $3,000.00 PLUS DOUBLE. LANDLORD FAILED TO REGULARLY INSPECT AND RESOLVE MOLD IN THIS UNIT AND THE BLDG. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PASTORA GUZMAN, JONAS ROGELIO SAFON TAYUM, KIMBLEY DAISY DALIA AS TO DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO. KONO-MANNING, JULIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLANTIFF'S CLAIN AND ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASTORA GUZMAN, JONAS ROGELIO SERVED OCT-20-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-20-2022 AS TO DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JULIE KONO, AGENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT T. OKAMOTO & CO.
